hcb8a5657g1069g4689gb3a1g42290dc14839: Let us go. I wish to feel the road beneath my hooves - taste the fresh grass!
h35fcf76cg4f14g4651gaf87gd40151111abd: That was fun! I want to stomp more of the small, dirty two-legs.
h26d4ec65g58bfg4a52g9c73gf9f246a804d9: If you are afraid, hide beneath my legs - like a good calf. I will stop them.
h318e4fd8g073dg4859ga8a3g06ccaee797ca: Let them come. I will bite. I will stamp.
